title: YAAVAAW 16Pcs Party Paper Cups, Merry Christmas Tableware Decor Red Santa Snowman Elk Pattern Disposable Dinner Cups for Birthday Parties & Xmas Supplies
features: Material: The paper plates, cups and napkins are made of 100% food grade Eco-friendly material, which is BPA-free and no-toxic. Note: Please don't microwave the plates and cups.
Size:each paper cup holds about 256ml.disposable Paper cups for saving your time and energy to clean up, which is convenient to use.
Christmas Design:Many Christmas elements on the plates,napkin,cups and table cloth can make your party more interesting and more attractive.
Party Supplies: Perfect Christmas tableware for Christmas theme party, home party or special occasions to brighten up the scenes and create funny atmosphere.
